name: Tuna Casserole- Microwave Style
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain and flake the tuna; set aside.
2. Cook noodles according to manufacturer's instructions, then drain and rinse in hot water.
3. Combine noodles with tuna, celery, and green onions.
4. Blend in sour cream, mustard, Miracle whip, thyme, and salt.
5. Spoon half of the mixture into a buttered 2-quart casserole dish.
6. Top with half the zucchini, then add the rest of the mixture, and again, top with the remainder of zucchini.
7. Cover the dish; microwave at high power for 6-8 minutes.
8. Top with cheese and tomato; microwave at high power for 2 more minutes.
9. Let stand for 3 minutes before serving.
Notes: Microwave times vary based on wattage used. The one I use is a 1000-watt Sanyo oven. This dish contains approximately 400 calories and 24 grams of carbohydrates per serving.
